title: D-hand mod fork
description: Crystal pvp utillity that acts as a double keybind for totemslot and inventory
body:
# Mod description
D-hand-mod is an open-source PvP utility for 1.19+ that binds totem keybind and inventory keybind into one, simulating a double keypress. Designed to reduce misclicks when double handing in Crystal PvP, it does not alter gameplay beyond this QoL feature.

Note for server owners: This mod can be detected via latest.log. Some servers may ban automation/double keybinding tools—check your server’s rules before use.

Not a hack: No unfair advantages (e.g., aim assist, X-ray), but use responsibly.

**This mod can be bannable in some servers as it does automate pressing two keys into one.**

__for server owners and anticheat devs, a way of detecting this mod will be checking latest__

# What does D-hand-mod do?
if you open your inventory, your totem slot is switched automatically before your vanilla inventory event - delayed by 15-45ms - which only happens IF you have a totem in your hotbar.

otherwise nothing will happen if:

you are already double handed

you do NOT have a totem in your hotbar

# Credits
Credits:
This mod is based on [D-hand mod] by [DLindustries].

Original project: <https://modrinth.com/mod/d-hand-mod>

This version is an unofficial update maintained by me.
